note: Preregistered thresholds and fixture set for the CoinAPI snapshot-only seeding experiment. Committed BEFORE any real-data arm was executed; the module constant experiments.snapshot_seed.PREREGISTERED is pinned equal by tests/test_snapshot_seed_experiment.py. A parity.spike_gt50_fraction failure may be overridden ONLY by PR-#28-style volatility attribution (spikes concentrated in hours where the CoinAPI reference itself moved), documented spike-by-spike in the experiment report.

amendments.note: Machine-enforcement amendment BEFORE any crossed-seed-day result was inspected (only the 2025-06-01 clean control had run): (1) shared-source arms must ALSO pass the injection-guarded parity verdict; (2) the economics bar is machine-evaluated on the conservative end of the cost band; (3) arm-name vocabulary reconciled with the runner. Thresholds unchanged; strictly tightening.

Deep-review amendment, added BEFORE its results were seen: coinapi_on_demand_L50 sensitivity arm added to close the REST depth-cap question empirically (a 2026-07-10 deep-review claim of a 50-level limit_levels max conflicts with the live-indexed 20-level docs cap; the endpoint page is bot-gated). The arm stays UNPRICED under the conservative 20-level purchasability cap, so it can only inform parity, never pass economics.
